description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named lib build that runs on push to master branch and tags matching v*.*.*, and on pull requests to master. The workflow should trigger only when changes are made to specific paths. Run two jobs, x64 and x86, on a windows-latest environment. For each job, check out the repository, set up the MSVC development environment for the respective architecture, cache libraries, and then set up the libraries using a batch script.
